body_transformation: The body retains its elongated dragon silhouette and quadruped stance, with four legs planted firmly on the ground. The light blue to dark blue gradient shifts to deep violet with ebony black accents along the spine, while the translucent skin reveals swirling crimson mist energy currents beneath the surface. The curled spiral tail tip now trails wispy shadowy vapor, and the horn-like head structures glow with pale silver energy, their sharp edges dissolving slightly into the surrounding air. Hollow eye sockets fill with swirling mist, and the neck curvature remains intact but appears slightly distorted by subtle energy ripples.
signature_feature: Tail tip: tattered shadowy vapor trailing from the curled spiral, dissolving into thin air.
